reviews.review_msg: This guy ruined my life
Hahahahahahah funny guy
Can someone who has taken ENSC 316 or 220 with this professor share if he scale/curve your original final grade? If so, how many letter grade did he scale/curve. Thanks for sharing.

Class opens the first page of the final exam, the entire room lets out a collective laugh. The format was completely different from what he told us it would be, and we hadn't seen a single question like what was on it. Never posts filled lecture slides. He says that this rmp score isn't a good reflection of him, but you be the judge of that.

Worst prof ever. This was my second class with him and he
(1) Gatekeeps lecture notes
(2) Rambles and mumbles 
(3) There will be many mistakes in his exams that he will point out WHEN YOU ARE DOING THE EXAM
(4) Cannot teach
(5) Complains when the half of the class fails
If you have to take 316 with him do the practice midterms religiously.

The final exam is so difficult that I started daydreaming mid-exam. Most likely failed that exam, and the marking is just not accurate.  Looks like the class average is going to be a C- or something, and will have to redo the course. Bernard is just a crappy prof
Bernie banana

Show up to the final exam today ready to go. I've been cramming the practice exams and ....... I get the most crazy exam I've ever seen placed in front of me. Extremely convoluted, high-minded theory questions that completely make me doubt I even did this class. Guess I'll be back next fall for Bernhard to make more bullshit exams.

Bernhard is fair but the course isn't easy. The material itself IS difficult and somewhat abstract so he cannot solely be blamed. However, the notes can be confusing and the in-class examples don't clarify much. Assignments are long and feel like busy work, and are not that helpful for the exams. SPAM PRACTICE EXAMS! (and read Griffiths textbook)

Makes a hard class even harder. Gatekeeping lecture slides. Cannot explain anything, minion language. You cannot understand anything from listening to him. Gives really long assignments for no reason, instead of focusing on the content, he focuses on MATLAB. Would not recommend, its a trap. He says that he cares but that's a lie.
rabus with run a bus through your brain. do not take this guy I beg
turns into mr mumbo jumbo during lectures as he seemingly forgets how to do half the questions on the notes. by far the worst professor I've had in my time at SFU. he seems like a great guy, though.

The only thing you need to pass this class is to memorize the sample midterm and final solutions. That being said, Bernhard makes class needlessly confusing, and most of the material ‘taught' isn't reflected in examinations anyways.
he has a heavy accent when teaching. His 3rd midterm test was so hard for no reason, and he kept changing the questions on the test as it wasn't even finished.

This man just reads off the lecture slides; he does not know how to teach the course materials. I learned significantly more from the TA and chatGPT than the prof himself. Hopefully someone else teaches this course other than Bernhard. If not... Good luck with him in this course.
In his own world. Considering he took on this class last min means hes regurgitating ash's material. He went easy on lab and exam marks cuz of the quality of lectures ig lol.

Terrible, avoid at all cost. Never so lost before. Class avg was high 20 highest mark is 60. I doubt the problem comes from student side. I wish there I can rate 0 cuz this is completely a waste of my money.

The ratings are construed by the one 5 star. This guy is not a good teacher for anything other than what he wants to teach which is “Synthetic Aperture Radar Applications”. The first midterm consisted of 1 question that somewhat resembled the homework and 5 others that seemed to be pulled out of a hat. Also, the formula sheet is next to useless.

He's the worst professor I've ever had- hits us with 2 hour mumbling with no breaks or good teaching. The tried and true way to pass his class is memorizing solutions and sourcing online. Every exam has a failing average, yet the professor fails to change his teaching. Assignments are ridiculously time consuming and have little learning purpose.
hardest course
Bernhard is a great professor. I took Synthetic Aperture Radar Applications with him, and it was one of the most interesting classes I have ever taken.

Definitely the hardest class I've taken, and it's not even close. Lectures are very monotonous, dry, and the material is extremely difficult to comprehend. I dislike the textbook used for this class. Consult the holy bible of Griffith's E&M if you wish to learn. I will say that he will answer your questions should you have any after lecture.

Rabus is absolutely TERRIBLE. He seems as if he's speaking to himself during the lectures, NEVER solves any examples during the class, hasn't even created the slides himself, provides close to no sample practices, etc..

I literally had to pause the class once to tell him how terrible he's teaching is.

Honestly, he doesn't know how to teach but if you're brave enough to ask questions he'll help you out. The lectures may seem like they don't help but they do, lectures are definitely horrible but the prof knows what he is teaching and will help you out if you ask questions.

Worst prof I've ever had. Class was so boring, always seemed like he is speaking to himself. Can't explain the content clearly. Didn't post solutions for homework or midterms. Rather take the course with any other prof

He's the worst profressor one could ever get. He literally mentioned that his daughters think that he's a bad teacher on his very first day. Never gives out solutions, never discuss questions or example and didn't even prepare his own material. He's using the same slides and material from a prof who taught this course last in 2017
